pending.body: finding_summary: The tracked `aro-1` run snapshot still contains the removed planner field. `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json:16-40` writes `active_run.stage_resolution_snapshot.final_review_planner`, and `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json:56-80` writes `last_stage_resolution_snapshot.final_review_planner`, even though `StageResolutionSnapshot` no longer defines that field in `src/contexts/project_run_record/model.rs:186-206` and `build_final_review_snapshot` now only emits reviewers plus arbiter in `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:8206-8223`. severity: high. affected_files: [".ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json"]. remediation_hint: Regenerate or update the checked-in run snapshot with the current code so both final-review snapshot blocks drop `final_review_planner`.

finding: `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json` still serializes legacy final-review planner resolution data. In the newly added active-stage snapshot, `final_review_planner` appears at lines 33-36 under `active_run.stage_resolution_snapshot`; the retained `last_stage_resolution_snapshot` also still contains `final_review_planner` at lines 73-76. This violates the contract to remove planner from final-review panel snapshots and can reintroduce planner-specific state in new run artifacts.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 3 -> Plan and Implement
